# unifi_site_to_site_vpn_tunnel (Data Source)

Look up a UniFi site-to-site VPN tunnel by `id` or `name` within a site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing site-to-site VPN tunnel by name.
data "unifi_site" "main" {
  name = "Default"
}

data "unifi_site_to_site_vpn_tunnel" "branch" {
  site_id = data.unifi_site.main.id
  name    = "Branch Office Tunnel"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `site_id` (String)

### Optional

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `origin` (String)
- `type` (String)
